concepts.name: Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A rectangular array of numbers or symbols.

concepts.name: Square Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix with an equal number of rows and columns.

concepts.name: Determinant
concepts.short_definition: A scalar value associated with a square matrix.

concepts.name: Scalar
concepts.short_definition: A single number.

concepts.name: 1x1 Determinant
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a 1x1 matrix is its single element.

concepts.name: 2x2 Determinant
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a 2x2 matrix calculated by a specific formula.

concepts.name: 3x3 Determinant
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a 3x3 matrix calculated using cofactor expansion or Sarrus' rule.

concepts.name: Cofactor Expansion
concepts.short_definition: A method to calculate determinants by expanding along a row or column.

concepts.name: Minor
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a submatrix formed by deleting a row and column.

concepts.name: Cofactor
concepts.short_definition: A minor multiplied by a sign determined by its position.

concepts.name: Sarrus' Rule
concepts.short_definition: A mnemonic for calculating 3x3 determinants.

concepts.name: Properties of Determinants
concepts.short_definition: Rules governing how determinants behave under matrix operations.

concepts.name: Row Operations
concepts.short_definition: Elementary operations performed on the rows of a matrix.

concepts.name: Column Operations
concepts.short_definition: Elementary operations performed on the columns of a matrix.

concepts.name: Determinant of Transpose
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a matrix is equal to the determinant of its transpose.

concepts.name: Transpose
concepts.short_definition: A matrix obtained by interchanging rows and columns.

concepts.name: Determinant of Product
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a product of matrices is the product of their determinants.

concepts.name: Matrix Multiplication
concepts.short_definition: A binary operation that produces a new matrix from two matrices.

concepts.name: Determinant of Inverse
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of an invertible matrix is the reciprocal of the determinant of its inverse.

concepts.name: Inverse Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix that, when multiplied by another matrix, yields the identity matrix.

concepts.name: Identity Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with ones on the main diagonal and zeros elsewhere.

concepts.name: Singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a determinant of zero.

concepts.name: Non-singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a non-zero determinant.

concepts.name: Determinant and Linear Independence
concepts.short_definition: A matrix has linearly independent columns (or rows) if and only if its determinant is non-zero.

concepts.name: Linear Independence
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors is linearly independent if no vector can be written as a linear combination of the others.

concepts.name: Vector
concepts.short_definition: A quantity having direction as well as magnitude.

concepts.name: Determinant and Rank
concepts.short_definition: The rank of a square matrix is equal to its size if and only if its determinant is non-zero.

concepts.name: Rank
concepts.short_definition: The maximum number of linearly independent row or column vectors in a matrix.

concepts.name: Determinant and Eigenvalues
concepts.short_definition: The determinant of a matrix is the product of its eigenvalues.

concepts.name: Eigenvalue
concepts.short_definition: A scalar associated with an eigenvector of a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Eigenvector
concepts.short_definition: A non-zero vector that, when a linear transformation is applied to it, changes only by a scalar factor.

concepts.name: Characteristic Polynomial
concepts.short_definition: A polynomial whose roots are the eigenvalues of a matrix.

concepts.name: Determinant of Characteristic Polynomial
concepts.short_definition: The constant term of the characteristic polynomial is related to the determinant.

concepts.name: Geometric Interpretation of Determinant
concepts.short_definition: The absolute value of the determinant represents the scaling factor of area or volume under a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: A function between two vector spaces that preserves vector addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Area Scaling
concepts.short_definition: How a 2D linear transformation scales areas.

concepts.name: Volume Scaling
concepts.short_definition: How a 3D linear transformation scales volumes.

concepts.name: Orientation
concepts.short_definition: The sign of the determinant indicates whether a linear transformation preserves or reverses orientation.

concepts.name: Adjugate Matrix
concepts.short_definition: The transpose of the cofactor matrix.

concepts.name: Determinant using Adjugate
concepts.short_definition: A formula for the inverse of a matrix using its adjugate and determinant.
